title: TvlGovernanceDTO
description: Content-free TVL 1.1 governance summary (RFC 0001, property P8): identifies WHICH calibrated variables, certificates, and policies governed a session — never their values, evidence, prompts, or signal contents. Certificates use the per-CVAR decision vocabulary shared with guarantee_certificate_schema.json (one ontology, two scopes: per-CVAR value certification here, per-config selection there). Echoed by the backend from an ALLOWLIST it constructs server-side; never caller-metadata passthrough.

governed.description: DECLARED governance (per-CVAR require_calibration, pinned certificate, or certificate-backed target) — never inferred from runtime evidence.

freshness_hash.description: sha256 of the canonical freshness context (hash only — the context itself never crosses).
